zh.lifeSummary: 當Humphrey Barrett於1592年出生在英國肯特阿福德時，他的父親John Barrett30歲，母親Jenor Wallacomb32歲。他於1613年3月4日與Mary Hawes在英國結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1662年11月7日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可康可德享年70歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可康可德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Humphrey Barrett于1592年出生在英国肯特阿福德时，他的父亲John Barrett30岁，母亲Jenor Wallacomb32岁。他于1613年3月4日与Mary Hawes在英国结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1662年11月7日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可康可德享年70岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可康可德。

nameMeanings.name: Barrett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): probably a nickname for a quarrelsome person, from Old French barat, Middle English bar(r)at, bar(r)et(te) ‘trouble, distress’, later ‘deception, fraud; contention, strife’. Through Norman settlement it also became common in Ireland, where it was Gaelicized as Baróid (Munster) and Baréid (Connacht).

variants.name: Barret
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Matthieu, Mirlande, Philippe.

French: derivative of the topographic name   Barre   1 ‘barrier’, or a habitational name from a place called with this word. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 3 below) is also found in Haiti.

variants.name: Baratta
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Carmine, Pasquale, Alfonse, Antonio, Carmela, Guido, Salvatore, Vincenzo.
Italian: occupational name for a market trader, especially in northern Italy, from baratta ‘exchange, sale, buying and selling’, a derivative of barattare ‘to barter’. See also Barrett .

nameMeanings.name: Humphrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman name, Hunfrid, of Germanic origin, derived from hun ‘bear-cub, warrior’ + fred, frid ‘peace’. The Norman form absorbed the native Old English form, Hunfrith, which existed in England before the Conquest. The spelling with -ph- reflects classicizing influence. Since the 16th century it has enjoyed a modest popularity in England, having been borne most notably by the youngest son of King Henry IV , the Duke of Gloucester ( 1391–1447 ), known as ‘Duke Humphrey’. He was noted as a patron of literature, and founded what became the Bodleian Library at Oxford. In modern times, probably the most famous bearer has been the film star Humphrey Bogart ( 1899–1957 ).

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Humphrey Barrett was born in 1592, in Ashford, Kent, England, his father, John Barrett, was 30 and his mother, Jenor Wallacomb, was 32. He married Mary Hawes on 4 March 1613, in England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 7 November 1662, in Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 70, and was buried in Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Humphrey Barrettが1592年にイギリスケントアシュフォードで生まれた時，父John Barrettは30歳，母Jenor Wallacombは32歳であった。1613年3月4日にイギリスでMary Hawesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1662年11月7日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスコンコルドで70歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスコンコルドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Humphrey Barrett(이)가 1592년 영국 켄트 애스h퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Barrett(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Jenor Wallacomb(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1613년 3월 4일 영국에서 Mary Hawes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1662년 11월 7일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 콘코르드에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 콘코르드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Humphrey Barrett nasceu em 1592, em Ashford, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Barrett, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Jenor Wallacomb, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Hawes em 4 de março de 1613, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 7 de novembro de 1662, em Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Humphrey Barrett родился в 1592 г. в местности ашфорд, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени John Barrett было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Jenor Wallacomb, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Hawes 4 марта 1613 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 7 ноября 1662 г. в местности конкорд, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности конкорд, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Humphrey Barrett nació en 1592, en Ashford, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, John Barrett, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Jenor Wallacomb, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Mary Hawes el 4 de marzo de 1613, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 7 de noviembre de 1662, en Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
